title.en: Medical devices — Application of risk management to medical devices
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 风险管理在医疗器械中的应用

standards.abstract: Specifies terminology, principles and a process for risk management of medical devices, including in vitro diagnostic devices.

title.en: Medical devices - Guidance on the application of ISO 14971
title.zh: 医疗器械 - ISO 14971应用指南

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on the application of ISO 14971 risk management to medical devices.
standards.scope: Medical devices -- Guidance on the application of ISO 14971 for risk management of medical devices.

title.en: Medical devices - Application of risk management to medical devices - Amendment 1
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 医疗器械风险管理的应用 - 修正案1

standards.abstract: Amendment 1 to ISO 14971:2019. Addresses editorial and technical corrections to the risk management standard for medical devices.
standards.scope: Amendment to the fundamental risk management standard for medical devices.

title.en: Application of risk management for IT-networks incorporating medical devices - Part 1: Safety, effectiveness and security in the implementation and use of connected medical devices or connected health software
title.zh: IT网络中纳入医疗器械的风险管理应用 - 第1部分：联网医疗器械或联网健康软件的实施和使用中的安全性、有效性和网络安全

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for risk management when medical devices or health software are incorporated into IT-networks. Edition 2.
standards.scope: Risk management for IT networks incorporating medical devices and health software.

title.en: Medical devices - Application of risk management to medical devices - Annex ZA/ZB/ZC (EU regulatory deviation)
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 医疗器械风险管理的应用 - 附录ZA/ZB/ZC（欧盟法规偏差）

standards.abstract: Adds Annexes ZA, ZB, and ZC to EN ISO 14971:2019, covering deviations from ISO 14971 required by EU MDR and IVDR. Critical for EU harmonized standard compliance.
standards.scope: EU-specific annexes for risk management (GSPR correlation and deviations).
standards.note: Must be used together with EN ISO 14971:2019 for EU MDR presumption of conformity.
